summary: WhatsApp Admin Dashboard Frontend Testing - ALL 11 TESTS PASSED. Verified page loading, 4 stat cards, 4 tabs functionality, template CRUD operations, and sidebar navigation.
critical_code_review_comments: All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Template dropdown correctly filters to show only approved templates in Test tab
Form validation works - Send Test button disabled when required fields empty
Auth token masking correctly shows ********** (configured) for security
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_template_playwright during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: WhatsApp Admin Dashboard frontend fully functional at /admin/whatsapp. All features working: 4 stat cards (Integration Active, Templates 3/1 approved, Messages Sent 0, Failed 0), 4 tabs (Overview with Connection Details + Recent Messages, Templates with CRUD, Logs showing empty state, Test with form). Template dropdown in Test tab correctly shows only approved templates. WhatsApp nav item visible in sidebar at position 32.

tests_executed.test: Admin WhatsApp page loads at /admin/whatsapp after login
All 4 tabs exist (Overview, Templates, Logs, Test)
Overview tab: shows Connection Details with API Endpoint and Auth Token masked
Overview tab: shows Recent Messages section
Templates tab: shows 3 templates (lead_notification, booking_confirmation, project_update)
Templates tab: shows status badges for each template
Templates tab: New Template button shows create form
Templates tab: Create form has name, description, body_text, variables inputs
Templates tab: Create template form works (created TEST_template_playwright)
Templates tab: Delete button works (deleted TEST_template_playwright)
Logs tab: shows 'No messages sent yet' when empty
Test tab: shows form with Country Code (+971 default), Phone Number, Template selector, Body Values
Test tab: Template dropdown only shows approved templates (lead_notification)
Test tab: Send button disabled when required fields empty
Sidebar: WhatsApp nav item visible with icon
